title: atylosia cajanoides
intro: Atylosia cajanoides, also known as the wild lablab or lablab tree, is a perennial leguminous vine native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Atylosia cajanoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, or used as a poultice to harness its medicinal properties.
